rationale: Based on feedback, remove survival bonus to close the large generated-private gap. Reduce terminal success reward from +500 to +300 to further reduce misalignment. Keep distance_reward base -0.5 and progress +1.0, velocity_penalty -0.5, angle_penalty -1.0, crash penalty -50. Remove fuel_efficiency (always zero).

components.description: Base distance penalty (-0.5 per unit distance) plus progress reward (1.0 * reduction in distance)
Penalty for high linear speed to encourage gentle landing

components.expression: float(done) * (300.0 if (np.sqrt(next_obs[0]**2 + next_obs[1]**2) < 0.1 and np.sqrt(next_obs[2]**2 + next_obs[3]**2) < 0.1 and abs(next_obs[4]) < 0.1) else -50.0) + 0.0
components.description: Large positive reward for successful landing (+300), crash penalty (-50), no survival bonus
